news.title:
City Union Bank's issuer rating reaffirmed as CARE AA; outlook revised to Positive.
Rating review by CARE Ratings received on March 30, 2026; action under SEBI Regulation 30.
news.summary:
City Union Bank's issuer rating reaffirmed as CARE AA; outlook revised to Positive.
Rating review by CARE Ratings received on March 30, 2026; action under SEBI Regulation 30.

news.title:
City Union Bank's FY24-25 refund claim reduced by ₹97.2 Cr; no demand raised.
Deductions partially disallowed; bank to appeal, expects no material financial impact.
news.summary:
City Union Bank's FY24-25 refund claim reduced by ₹97.2 Cr; no demand raised.
Deductions partially disallowed; bank to appeal, expects no material financial impact.

news.title:
City Union Bank appoints Shri Venkatakrishnan S as Chief Risk Officer effective April 1, 2026.
Outgoing CRO Shri Kalyanaraman M to retire on March 31, 2026, after superannuation.
news.summary:
City Union Bank appoints Shri Venkatakrishnan S as Chief Risk Officer effective April 1, 2026.
Outgoing CRO Shri Kalyanaraman M to retire on March 31, 2026, after superannuation.

news.title:
City Union Bank participated in 'Chasing Growth 2026' conference by Kotak Institutional Equities.
The event, held on Feb 26, 2026, was informed via Regulation 30 compliance disclosure.
news.summary:
City Union Bank participated in 'Chasing Growth 2026' conference by Kotak Institutional Equities.

news.title:
City Union Bank Ltd will participate in Kotak Institutional Equities' 'Chasing Growth 2026' conference on Feb 26, 2026.
The event schedule is available on the bank's website, per Regulation 30 (LODR) disclosure requirements.

news.title: City Union Bank got RBI nod for R. Vijay Anandh as MD & CEO.
news.summary: City Union Bank got RBI nod for R. Vijay Anandh as MD & CEO.

news.title:
City Union Bank Ltd hosted the audio recording of its Q3 & 9M FY26 earnings call on its website.
The standalone unaudited financial results for the period ending December 31, 2025, were declared on February 2, 2026.
news.summary:
City Union Bank Ltd hosted the audio recording of its Q3 & 9M FY26 earnings call on its website.
The standalone unaudited financial results for the period ending December 31, 2025, were declared on February 2, 2026.

news.title:
Key stocks to watch: Infosys, PB Fintech, Tata Power, Coal India, Bharti Airtel, City Union Bank, IRB Infra.
Earnings highlights: PB Fintech Q3 revenue rose 37.1%, net profit up 164%; Tata Chemicals Q3 revenue fell 1.1%, net loss Rs 93 crore.
news.summary:
Key stocks to watch: Infosys, PB Fintech, Tata Power, Coal India, Bharti Airtel, City Union Bank, IRB Infra.
Earnings highlights: PB Fintech Q3 revenue rose 37.1%, net profit up 164%; Tata Chemicals Q3 revenue fell 1.1%, net loss Rs 93 crore.

news.title:
City Union Bank's Q3 GNPA improves to 2.2%, down from 2.4% QoQ.
NNPA for Q3 improves to 0.8%, compared to 0.9% QoQ, showing better asset quality.
news.summary:
City Union Bank's Q3 GNPA improves to 2.2%, down from 2.4% QoQ.
NNPA for Q3 improves to 0.8%, compared to 0.9% QoQ, showing better asset quality.

news.title:
City Union Bank reported Q3 FY26 income at ₹2001 crore, net profit ₹332 crore.
Gross NPA stood at 2.2%, with 9M FY26 net profit at ₹967 crore.
news.summary:
City Union Bank reported Q3 FY26 income at ₹2001 crore, net profit ₹332 crore.
Gross NPA stood at 2.2%, with 9M FY26 net profit at ₹967 crore.

news.title:
City Union Bank announces board meeting on February 2, 2026, to review and approve standalone unaudited financial results for Q3 FY26.
The results will be subject to limited review by the Joint Statutory Central Auditors, as per SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
City Union Bank announces board meeting on February 2, 2026, to review and approve standalone unaudited financial results for Q3 FY26.
The results will be subject to limited review by the Joint Statutory Central Auditors, as per SEBI regulations.

This reflects strong performance and momentum in private banking.

Key performance areas include asset quality, capital adequacy, and profitability.

news.title:
Top small-cap mutual funds favor financials, commodities, and niche sectors, with MCX, Karur Vysya Bank, and City Union Bank popular picks.
Nippon India Small Cap Fund leads with MCX, while Quant Small Cap Fund tilts toward Reliance, Jio Financial, and Adani Power.
news.summary:
Top small-cap mutual funds favor financials, commodities, and niche sectors, with MCX, Karur Vysya Bank, and City Union Bank popular picks.
Nippon India Small Cap Fund leads with MCX, while Quant Small Cap Fund tilts toward Reliance, Jio Financial, and Adani Power.
